name: Chicken & Tortellini Salad Ocean Mermaid
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups Cooked Chicken, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
To make the pesto:
1. In a food processor or blender, puree all the ingredients for pesto in batches.
2. Transfer to a small bowl and cover with a piece of plastic wrap directly on the surface to prevent discoloring.
3. Pesto may be made in advance and kept covered and chilled. It will keep about 2 weeks.
1. Cook the tortellini in a kettle of boiling, salted water until al dente.
2. Drain well and refresh under cold water.
3. In a large bowl, toss together the tortellini and pesto.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours (or overnight).
5. Add the remaining ingredients, except oil to the salad.
6. Combine well and add olive oil only if the salad seems dry.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
